Bash(APP_ENV=local .venv/bin/python -c "
import asyncio
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\('.env.local'\)
from app.database import init_engines, get_keycloak_db
from app.routers.dashboard import get_overview
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

async def test\(\):
    init_engines\(\)
    async for db in get_keycloak_db\(\):
        from sqlalchemy import select, func
        from app.models.remittance import Transaction
        result = await db.execute\(select\(func.count\(\)\).select_from\(Transaction\)\)
        print\('transaction count:', result.scalar\(\)\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
")
